# van der Waals
#==============

MM3CAP:UNIT SIGMA angstrom
MM3CAP:UNIT EPSILON kcalmol
MM3CAP:SCALE 1 0.0
MM3CAP:SCALE 2 0.0
MM3CAP:SCALE 3 1.0

# ---------------------------------------------
# KEY      ffatype  SIGMA  EPSILON  ONLYPAULI
# ---------------------------------------------

MM3CAP:PARS      C_ME     2.040   0.027      0
MM3CAP:PARS      H_ME     1.620   0.020      0
